title: CEO Ron Zabel featured in Unicorns Journal
content_html:
Cryptool CEO Ron Zabel is the subject of a new in-depth interview in Unicorns Journal.

In the interview Ron talks about the inefficiencies he saw across decentralised and traditional finance, and how that thinking led to Cryptool: a single platform for asset and fund management built for both retail investors and professional fund managers.

The full interview is on unicorns.club for anyone who wants the longer story behind the platform.
author: Cryptool
